content.title: Weighted Pseudo-Random Distribution for Business Event Allocation
content.summary: Optimized reward distribution system combining event weighting for business objectives with pseudo-random distribution for fairness. Addresses problems in loyalty programs, A/B testing, game rewards, and load balancing.
content.description: This solution applies weighted pseudo-random distribution to solve real business problems in probabilistic resource allocation. It combines intentional weighting (to drive business objectives like user reactivation) with pseudo-random distribution algorithms (inspired by Dota 2) to ensure fairness and predictability.
content.problem_solved: Pure random distribution in business systems leads to perceived unfairness, low engagement, and extreme outliers. This solution uses weighted probabilities combined with pseudo-random distribution to ensure fair, predictable, and goal-oriented resource allocation.
use_cases: Customer loyalty programs with surprise bonuses
